matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100001001 3
1 0001100000 2
2 0000000001 1
3 0011011100 5
4 0001101000 3
5 1111111001 8
6 0101111010 6
7 0001001000 2
